What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

labor support, postpartum support, childbirth education classes, home birth support

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Keep inquiry form replies, consults, and hospital-specific birth prep on one board.
  • Track labor support, class enrollment, and postpartum visits without bouncing between email and paper notes.
  • Keep prenatal resources, Q&A follow-ups, and testimonial asks tied to the same client record.
